title: elec Space Wireless Mouse 2.4GHz Cool Sport Car Shape Wireless Mouse Optical Cordless Mice with USB Receiver for PC Laptop Computer 1600 DPI 3 Buttons Gold
description:
Cool sport car shaped wireless mouse for laptop computer notebook,eyecatching ergonomic design,good choice as gifts for kids,teens,students,teachers,girls,women and men. Mini Receiver can be inserted into the slot in the bottom of the mouse, allowing ease storage when not used.  Uses 2.4Ghz wireless optical technology, transmission up to 10 metres operating distance. Plug and play, no need any drive, works on most surfaces smoothly. Support most operating system, Windows 98 / ME / NT / 2000 / XP / Vista / Win 7 / Linux or Mac OS. With cool design and comfortable hand feeling,this wireless mouse give you special experience in using it.   Powered by 1 * AA battery (Not Included),Dimension:4.5(L)*1.7(H)*2(W)inch, Net Weight:2.47oz,1600 DPI,3 Buttons.  Switch Life: 5 million cycles,Automatically Power saving sleeping function.
How to use:
1.The USB receiver is placed in the bottom of the mouse;Take out the USB receiver, then plug the USB into computer; Prepare 1* AA battery when you first use it(not included);The mouse and receiver will connect automatically in a few seconds. 2.If it can not go to paring mode,the mouse need to pair with the USB again:Turn off the Switch,pull down the USB receiver from computer, then plug in the USB and turn on the mouse switch again,get the mouse colse distance with the USB receiver.
Notes:
Cute design with LED headlight,the headlight is formed only because of light transmission,sometimes it hides inside that you cannot see it,this won't affect use. The light is not strong,this could save battery power.
Package Included:
1 x Wireless mouse 1 x USB receiver (placed inside the top cover) 1 x Using instruction
features: Wireless usb optical mouse fashion sport car design,cool gaming mouse for laptop computer,good choice for using or as gifts for kids,girls,women and men
Powered by 1 AA battery(not included),Size:4.5(L)*1.7(H)*2(W)inch, Net weight:2.47oz,1600 DPI,3 Buttons (the receiver is placed in the bottom of the mouse)
Plug and Play, no any drive is needed;Energy-saving,if mouse is not used for short time, it will turn to power saving mode to save energy
2.4GHz wireless digital transmission technology, operation distance is up to 10 meters
Support most operating system,Windows 98 / ME / NT / 2000 / XP / Vista / Win 7 / Linux or Mac OS and more

reviews.title: Come on!
reviews.text: Was not responding to anything.  New battery, new computer,  new usb...sheesh!!  So cute and as you read, I tried my hardest to get it to work.

reviews.title: A Good Buy!
reviews.text: Cute and it works well..  The on/off switch is very small--only complaint.  A Good Buy !

reviews.title: boss enjoyed it for the 3 or so months it worked
reviews.text: Gag gift, boss enjoyed it for the 3 or so months it worked. It did stop working even after fresh batteries.

reviews.title: Nice looking but.....
reviews.text:
This mouse looks like the picture. the USB neatly stores into the bottom of the car.
What I didn't like about it is:
1. One of the wheels has rough edges and where the battery fits is also a rough edge. They catch on my mouse pad, a lot.
Only one of the wheels move. If they all did, I think it would make the mouse smoother when you are working with it.
I didn't use it in time to return it so I am stuck with it. I think I may have to try and file it down.

reviews.title: Got lot of compliments and likes for the shape and ...
reviews.text: Got lot of compliments and likes for the shape and looks but I bought this in April of this year and now in September 30 it has quit working, I expected it to work at the least a year

This keyboard has 3 bluetooth channels which is very convenient. Now I connected it with my company laptop, my personal MacBook and iPad. Light to move from room to room. Happy to have it.

reviews.title: Great looking and feeling mouse!
reviews.text: I LOVE THIS MOUSE! I got in real and I love the strip of light along the sides. I had to dock a star because the little usb that gets stored on the bottom won’t come out. The little notch isn’t deep enough for my nails or a card to go under. (See photo). Although, I’m still able to use it via Bluetooth and that works great. I have no idea what the DPI button on the top does since the instructions don’t say anything about it. Oh and I’ve been using it for about 2.5 weeks now and I haven’t had to recharge the battery. 👍🏼

title: Logitech Wireless Mouse M315 - Vivid Violet
description: The feel-good, reliable mouse —that’ll make you forget the touchpad. From surfing the Web to updating your Facebook—you’ll be mousing on more surfaces thanks to Logitech Advanced Optical. No delays, dropouts or hassles. The plug-and-forget nano-receiver keeps you connected with reliable 2.4 GHz wireless. With 12 months of battery life (AA Battery included!), you don’t have to deal with the hassle of frequent battery changes.
features: Logitech Advanced Optical Tracking - Enjoy precise clicking and pointing—on surfaces other optical mice can’t handle—while navigating your favorite websites thanks to Logitech Advanced Optical Tracking.
Logitech Advanced 2.4 GHz wireless connectivity - You get the reliability of a cord with wireless convenience and freedom—fast data transmission and virtually no delays or dropouts.
1-year battery life (AA Battery included!) - You can go for a year without battery hassles. An On/Off switch and smart sleep mode extend battery life, while an indicator light eliminates surprises.
Plug-and-forget nano-receiver - So small and unobtrusive, you can plug it into a USB port and forget about it. Plus, you can say good-bye to worries about broken or lost receivers.
Compact comfort - You’ll enjoy more comfort and ease thanks to this compact mouse’s hand-friendly, contoured design with soft rubber grips and a smooth scroll wheel.

reviews.title: Love it!
reviews.text: Hard to go wrong with a Logitech mouse - at least I never have!  The color looks exactly as pictured and matches my Dell laptop multi-color hardcover nicely.  Good handling and lightweight, will see how long the battery lasts before I have to change it.

reviews.title: Great little mouse
reviews.text: I love these mice...small, easy to carry.  Only think I wish is that the receivers matched the mouse so that if you have two or three different colored ones you would know which receiver goes with which mouse!

reviews.title: Perfect
reviews.text: I was looking for something a bit angled because my wrist was feeling uncomfortable but I didn't want an extreme twist to the side. I've always used Logitech mice but this has been working great. I wish it had a couple more buttons on it so I could set a button to heal and one to my 4th skill but otherwise it's just what I needed. It goes to sleep when you don't use it and wakes up when you click so I don't have to turn it off. And it's blurple, the best color.

reviews.title: Perfect fit

The scrolling feature only works randomly, most of the time when you click, you have to click twice for it to work. Used brand new batteries but it didn't make a difference. Disappointed that I wasted money, will stick with a name brand.

reviews.title: Cute item but it doesn't stay connected.
reviews.text:
Super cute item! It took me a while to get use to the small click space and it tracks well but the main issues is the USB isn't reliable. Anytime I put the laptop to sleep or I don't use the mouse for a while I have to unplug the USB and turn the mouse on/off. It is really inconvenient but my return wind has closed to exchange it.

Looks are a 10 and functionality is a 2 because it does not work as intended.

reviews.title: low quality
reviews.text: I received a replacement for the first one that would shut off and on constantly. The 2nd one worked for about a week and then stopped. When trying to remove the USB connector from my laptop it cam apart. Part of it got stuck in the USB port. It took over 5 minutes to pull the rest of it out with tweezers! I returned it for a refund. This is a low quality piece of junk. Do not buy.

reviews.title: Cheap- don’t buy it!
reviews.text: This mouse works some of the time... very cute but unreliable. For the return process, I had to pack and ship on my own. It cost half the price of the mouse to return.

reviews.title: Cutest thing ever
reviews.text: So adorable! It moves super smoothly and I love the color. It is wider than most mice I'd say, but not by much. It still feels natural and easy to use. The buttons are easy to use as well. My only concern is that when I have to wake my computer up from sleep mood, I really have to shake it. But that may be my sensitivity settings, but they were just fine with my previous mouse. Either way, this is super cute and I love it!

reviews.title: DESTROYS PORTS! DO NOT BUY!
reviews.text: The first one died after 2 hours. It damaged the port on one side of my laptop. The replacement did the same thing to the other side. I now have no functioning ports - can’t use another mouse or flash drives. This company owes me a new laptop!!!!

title: RAPIQUE Bluetooth Wireless Mouse, Rechargeable Slient Multi-Device Computer Mice (Tri-Mode: BT1/2+2.4Ghz) with USB Receiver, Ergonomic Cordless Mouse for Laptop/MacBook/PC/iPad(Mint Green to Purple)
features: 🎉INNOVATIVE GRADIENT COLOUR DESIGN - Innovative unique gradient color that shocks your perspective. coupled with fine craftsmanship, make your mouse shine. Is a perfect gift choice.

It realizes accessible switches between 3 devices by clicking the mode switch button located at the bottom of the mouse. The indication lights of BT1, BT2, and 2.4G USB are green, blue, and red, respectively. Simple & convenient to work from the desktop to the tablet, or laptop to Macbook、iPad, etc.

🎉RECHARGEABLE & AUTO SLEEP FUNCTION - Supports TYPE C to TYPE C cable charging. It can be easily fast and stable charged using the USB C cable without replacing the battery. Better energy efficiency and environmental protection. It will enter sleep mode after 1.5 minutes of inactivity for power saving, and wake it up by clicking any button or moving the mouse.

🎉SILENT CLICK & HIGH RESPONSIVENESS - This noiseless mouse reduces the noise by up to 90%, no need to worry about the click sound disturbing others. 3 Adjustable DPI Settings(800, 1200, and 1600)are very precise with every sensitive movement.

🎉COMFORTABLE & DURABLE DESIGN - Ergonomic design with an elegant profile. It has 6 buttons including 2 buttons for forward and backward on the left side ideal for both work and gaming. Tested over 5 million times click lifespan ensure long-term stable use.

🎉WIDE COMPATIBILITY - The BT 5.1 is compatible with windows 8/10(but not windows 7 or XP), Android, and Mac OS systems; the 2.4G USB connected mode supports any USB-enabled device, which just needs to insert the USB receiver. It Fits desktops, laptops, PC, Macbooks, Chromebook, and Surface pro.

Note: 1. Bluetooth 5.1 supports the ios system for both iPad and iPhones, but the ios system has to be ios 14 or later version; 2. the side buttons are not available for Mac OS, but the other function can be used normally.

reviews.title: False advertisement
reviews.text:
See attached image. This is what you get. Colors of the actual item and the color of the advertised item. Not even close. Mouse itself is "ok" at best. DPI button makes noise like it is a mouse straight from 1990s. Item returned.

Update: Seller reached out to me and sent out a replacement, white and blue version. Mouse received and the colors are true to the image. DPI button needs improvement and the seller has promised to continue working on that feature. Otherwise can only say that it was a proper and appreciated gesture from the seller. Score updated to 4/5 for customer service.

reviews.title: Perfect Mouse for size and function!
reviews.text:
[[VIDEOID:765cefcf509f1ae4e5ecc0b46111d5ea]] Pros - lots of practical features such as soft click, back/fwd, click scroll wheel for multi directional pointer, also connects to multiple devices at the same time. Battery life is great as well and it also works while charging. Price is so good I bought a couple of them for my home office and work office as well as gifts for co-workers. Looks great on desk as well.

Cons - None really but the feet on the bottom have tiny invisible plastic packaging wrap on them that has to be peeled off or it becomes old and sticky making mouse hard to move. Took me a hot minute to figure this out.

reviews.title: RAPIQUE Bluetooth Wireless Mouse
reviews.text:
RAPIQUE Bluetooth Wireless Mouse
Great mouse. USB C re-chargeable. Can run in bluetooth or RF mode. Lights up so can see when lights are off. Feels great. Compact but not to compact, is still comfortable and ergonomical.
Affordable.
I used to buy the well known name brand mouse that can cost 2 to 4 times the price. With the competitor mouse after about 6 to 12 months it would start to double click. I now feel maybe that is "planned obsolence", so I will no longer buy that mouse.
The main shortcuts I use are forward and back which are already on two side buttons. I then also use Start + D for Desktop, so I can do that with this mouse.
Liked it so much bought 2 more for my other laptops / backups.
Great mouse.

reviews.title: Best looking mouse for a macpro .
reviews.text: I connected the mouse via BT on my MacBook pro. Lasts me all day will purchase it again if mine stopped working. So far so good.

reviews.title: Good find!
reviews.text: I got this to keep in my work bag as a backup/when I work from home. I will say the first impression wasn't stellar. The top plastic has a cheap look/feel to it. But it also makes up in some nice touches. For example, the USB fob. I was apprehensive about the keep slot for it because there wasn't something that made it feel or look actually secured. But turns out, there's magnetic component so it gets sucked in rather than loosely placed. Battery power seems as advertised. I haven't charged mine in about a month and it's still going. Ergonomics is about what you'd expect based on the photos.

reviews.title: No more Batteries
reviews.text: Love my new mouse! Old one I would turn off and on all the time to save battery. This one I keep wanting to then remember it goes to sleep and no more batteries. First charge went fast, haven't had to charge it since. Love the self storing dongle. Should have purchased this long time ago.

title: LZYDD Mouse Anti-Slip Tape Elastics Refined Side Grips Sweat Resistant Pads / Anti Sweat Paste for Logitech G Pro Wireless Mouse
description: Anti-Slip tape Elastics Refined Side Grips Sweat resistant pads / anti sweat paste for Logitech G pro wireless mouse
features: Come with 1 set including 4 parts ( 2 top parts and 2 side parts)
Only Anti-Slip tape included, No mouse included

reviews.title: Amazing addition to the Logitech G Pro Wireless!
reviews.text: Great quality, precision cut pieces that fit EXACTLY in the shape of the mouse. Whoever designed the CAD for this did a great job on the measurements. Using the grip itself, also crazy how something so small makes a big difference. No more worrying about it slipping off my right thumb which I mentally couldn't handle. It's shame that Logitech didn't design the grip but this will do nicely until they do.

reviews.title: They're ok.
reviews.text:
I'm only using the side grips. (No issue with the texture of the buttons, so imo, its best to just not use them and keep the mouse as light as possible)

Its definitely an improvement over the stock plastic feel, which is too smooth for me. These add some grip, and even a bit of cushion.

Guess I was expecting a more grippy feeling. Maybe a more pronounced texture. There is definitely room for improvement for those of us with sweaty gaming hands.

I also wish the edges were tapered off at its edges rather than a hard cut, but that's a minor nitpick and not too important.

I will say with these grips, I am having trouble deciding between which mouse to use primarily... G Pro Wireless or Viper Ultimate. This is definitely something that was missing from the G Pro Wireless's design for me.

How to use it? * Charge the mouse for about 2 hours before using it for the first time. 1. Take the dongle out, which is stored at the bottom of the mouse. 2. Insert the dongle into the USB port of your device, and open the mouse switch (at the bottom of the mouse). 3. Allow a few seconds for installing, no action needed, just wait. Then you can use it. Note: If your computer is Type-C port, please insert the USB-C to USB receiver into the Type-c port of the device first, then insert the USB receiver into the USB-C to USB receiver. Turn on the power switch and the mouse will work. Tips: The mouse cursor will move slowly or stop moving when the mouse is low battery. Please charge it on time. The blue light beside the scroll wheel will be on while charging, and then goes off when the mouse is fully charged.

reviews.title: Excelent value laptop
reviews.text: My daughter needed a faster more copact laptop for her graphics software so we gave this one a try.  Very fast, easy setup...nice and easy to chuck the bloatware.  A reasonable price made it an easy choice...so much so that we purchased another.

reviews.title: Definitely returning and buying a different brand
reviews.text: I had high hopes for this laptop... very very very slow. I mean how can a company like HP in this day in age make a laptop this slow. I didn’t expect speeds you would see in a gaming laptop for this price but I at least want to be able to watch a movie or even start the laptop within 10 minutes, and they don’t even allow you to upgrade the RAM or anything from what I can tell... and the battery life is laughable, like a previous comment said, about 1 percent per minute. I would even go as far as to say that it dies faster than that. Purchased this for my sister for her birthday but will definitely return and go with a different laptop.

title: Logitech M305 Gold Tendrils Wireless Mouse
description: This wireless mouse features 1000 dpi optical technology for responsive cursor control and 2.4GHz wireless technology for a reliable connection.

reviews.title: Nice design
reviews.text: I use this with my netbook to control it across the room. It is smaller than most other mouse. It goes easily in my travel bag. Nice design. I got tired of plain black.

reviews.title: One of the best everyday mice I've used
reviews.text:
I have input devices for drawing on my tablet, and I have a gaming mouse, but the Logitech M305 is an excellent mouse for every day use, so it's the one I use the most.

The mouse itself has very basic features,
* scroll wheel (mild clicking feedback)with side-click options
* battery status light (green when fully charged, red when almost out)
* two buttons
* an off switch
* a nano USB transmitter than stores inside the mouse
* uses a single AA battery

It does come in jazzy designs, and I liked the yellow/gold one the best. The one thing I might have wanted to change on this mouse is the on/off switch. The best nano-USB mouse I've ever had would automatically turn off when you stored the transmitter inside. With this one, be sure to flip the switch to off as well before you put it in your bag, or it will be down there draining the battery as it moves around.

title: Logitech M585 Multi-Device Wireless Mouse – Control and Move Text/Images/Files Between 2 Windows and Apple Mac Computers and Laptops with Bluetooth or USB, 2 Year Battery Life, Graphite
description: Talk about a game changer! With Logitech FLOW, M585 Multi-Device has the almost magical capacity to navigate seamlessly on two computers and copy-paste from one to the other – even if you're using a PC and a Mac. It certainly beats sending yourself emails. M585 also comes with a host of other features to improve your productivity, your way: fast and easy scrolling through long web pages; five programmable buttons, including two handy thumb buttons; a 2-year battery life** and a curved, domed shape that supports your palm comfortably during long hours of work or play. Dual connectivity (Bluetooth or 2.4 GHz Logitech Unifying). System Requirements: Required: Bluetooth low energy technologyWindows 10 or later Windows 8Mac OS X 10.10 or lateChrome OSAndroid 5.0 or later|Required: Available USB portWindows 10 or later Windows 8 Windows 7Mac OS X 10.05 or laterChrome OS|Internet connection for software download USB port.

DUAL CONNECTIVITY - Use with up to three Windows or Mac computers and laptops via included Unifying receiver or Bluetooth Smart wireless technology

ULTRA-PRECISE SCROLLING- Micro-precision wheel packs more grooves per millimeter to make scrolling through long webpages faster and easier

reviews.title: Excellent travel size and 6 month long battery life!
reviews.text:
Updated 1 year later(May 3, 2020)

Down grading from 5 stars to 3 stars because it turns out there might be a bug in the mouse that once you pair it with 2 different computers over bluetooth, you cannot reset the mouse to use the wireless dongle. There is also no support on the Logitech website - try searching their website for the manual for this mouse, it's absolutely missing. You'll see an FAQ section and some various sections on tech spec, but no setup guide or manual!

*********

If you're tried of replacing batteries, this mouse is for you! I'm impressed by how long a single AA battery lasts in this mouse. I haven't had to replace the battery since getting it 6 months ago even with daily use. The two modes is nice since it lets me connect this mouse to two computers! The bluetooth is strong and connects well to my MacBook Pro, while the included radio frequency receiver is plugged into a iMac and I can switch between computers with a. simple button click.

reviews.title: Great travel mouse!
reviews.text: Love the feel of it. Easy to connect. Small enough to use for travel yet big enough to where it doesn’t hurt to use ergonomically.

reviews.title: WOW! Seamless movement from one computer to the other!
reviews.text:
This device synched to both computers quickly. Download the 'Logi Options' software on both, then enable 'Flow'
Move the mouse off the bottom of one screen & it appears at the top of the other laptop.
Copy a file on computer one, switch to the computer two, right-click->paste. You have copied the file took computer one to computer two.
The mouse itself is legit comfortable, precise asks smooth.
Add 'Flow' and it is also revolutionary.
Highly recommend.

reviews.title: Nice mouse for Mac Pro using Big Sur OS
reviews.text: I was looking for a mouse for my MacPro computer.  It's got 2 buttons on the mouse that I wanted to setup as volume up, and volume down.  But there is no instructions on how to do this, and I can't find any.  I'm using the mouse as a standard mouse with scroll for web pages.  Works perfect for that.

reviews.title: Nice and quiet
reviews.text:
Nice, quiet mouse at a great price. It's on the smaller size, just what I needed for carrying in the computer bag. I have long fingers, but not necessarily large hands, and this fits perfectly for me. The scroll wheel is nice and smooth (and also quiet). You can feel some tactile "knurling" when you scroll, so it's not baby's-butt-smooth, but it's not like scrolling over a circular-saw blade either.

Using the USB dongle, the mouse is very responsive. The Bluetooth connection seemed a little laggy to me. No stars off unless it does the same when I test it on another PC.

I do not intend to install the Logitech Options software so I cannot speak to the usefulness of Flow or reassigning buttons.

Pros
- USB and Bluetooth connectivity
- Can use with up to two devices.
- 7 buttons: L, R, Center, Center-Left, Center-Right, Back, Forward. Eight if you include the PC selector button.
- Very quiet left/right click buttons
- Nearly quiet center click and back/forward buttons
- Uses one AA battery (preferred over non-replaceable battery)
- Battery life advertised at 2 years.
- Has an on/off switch on the bottom

Cons
- Possible laggy response using Bluetooth. I need to test on another PC to be sure.

Other consideration:
- The USB dongle storage is behind the battery door. If you frequently remove the dongle from the PC, this might be a concern for you (it's not a problem for me).

reviews.title: Excellent Keyboard!
reviews.text: This was a Christmas gift for my daughter and she absolutely loves everything about this keyboard. Thank you

reviews.title: Keyboard is very loud when typing!
reviews.text: The mouse is pretty standard, nothing great, but nothing bad. I brought my cute little set to work in my laptop bag so I figured it was secure. When I took the keyboard out 1 letter had popped off. No biggie, it snapped back on easily. The keyboard buttons are bit higher than I'm used to so I was typing slower and it was a bit uncomfortable after a while. I planned on switching back to my regular keyboard shortly but what escalated that switch was how loud the keyboard was while I was typing. My office is usually rather quiet plus I'm in a cubicle and a coworker asked what are you doing over there!?! He said it sounded like I was hammering the letters with a small hammer. I knew it was loud but after realizing it was bothering my coworkers I immediately put it in my bag to bring home. Haven't used it since!

reviews.title: Nice keyboard and mouse set
reviews.text: This is a great mouse and keyboard set, feels like typing on an old typewriter but more comfortable. I like the combined usb. Looks very nice, comfortable to use,

reviews.title: Amusing
reviews.text: I really like this set. They both match perfectly. The keyboard is comfortable and all the buttons work perfectly. I like the round buttons they are pretty cool. Connects easy enough. Just wish it was rechargeable.

reviews.title: Plug and Play Wireless Keyboard; Not sure about the mouse
reviews.text: I run Windows 10 on my laptop, and this wireless keyboard was up and running in few minutes after unpackaging.  You will need to provide your own batteries (2 AA – one for the mouse and one for the keyboard).  The keys are not tactile like other “typewriter” keyboard I have, but the keys have enough tension in the loaded spring to give a slight “satisfactory” feel to the keystrokes.  The wireless connection between the receiver and the keyboard/mouse was responsive and experienced no noticeable delay.  I am not 100% sold on the “milk tea” colored keyboard, but it slowly grew on me after a few days of use, although my 8-year young daughter thought it was like a puke color… an interesting observation.  The mouse was not for me.  It was too flat and too small for my hand, and after a few hours of cumbersome use, I switched back to my existing mouse pad.  For less than $49 USD, I think this keyboard brings a fun look to the otherwise a boring office environment.

reviews.title: Wired + Wireless?  Work for you? Good multimedia controls & phone slot

Not a fan of wireless accessories (the batteries typically fail without warning, makers want you to be surprised), I made an exception for this pairing model because the keyboard is wired.

PRO

-Economical
-Numeric pad
-Multimedia buttons: Volume knob, buttons for mute, pause, previous, next

CON

NEUTRAL

reviews.title: Fun cordless mouse and keyboard

That gives me more USB ports available for other things. It works great as long as the keyboard and mouse are close to the laptop or the tower. It lags a bit when it’s in a keyboard drawer. I like the compact and portable nature this setup includes!

reviews.title: pink keyboard and wireless mouse

Easily plugged right into my all-in-one computer.  Took me a little while to get used to the punk keycaps, and now I love how quiet and comfortable they are to use.  The mouse fits well in my hand, and the wheel rolls back and forth smoothly. Top 5 stars for this one!
